ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF. MATTER WAS HEARD, NO OPPOSITION MADE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULINGS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). TRIAL IS SET ON JAN. 10, 2011 AT 11:15 AM. IN DEPT. 220 CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF'S AGREEMENT THAT SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE HEARD ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. LAST DAY FOR HEARING A SUMMARY MOTION IS DEC. 30, 2010. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE ALL SETTLEMENT DEMANDS ON ALL DEFENDANTS BY DEC. 28, 2010 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET IN FOR JAN. 4, 2011 AT 9:00 AM. IN DEPT. 603. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER ABOUT ALL OTHER CASE MANAGEMENT/SCHEDULING ISSUES. ORDER SUBMITTED AND SINGED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (220)
